2.reason: The function declaration uses 'struct node' which is not yet defined at this point. The struct node definition appears after this declaration, causing a compilation error. Move the struct definition before the function declaration or use a forward declaration properly.

43.reason: [This condition should be in an 'else' block or use 'else if' to avoid double insertion when both conditions could be checked. As written, after inserting into left child, it may also check and insert into right child in same loop iteration, causing undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition should be in an 'else' block or use 'else if' to avoid double insertion when both conditions could be checked. reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition overlaps with the previous 'if'; when data < temp->data is false, data >= temp->data is always true, causing both branches to potentially execute in one loop iteration. This leads to incorrect tree insertion logic. It should be 'else' instead of a second 'if'.]
